messages.noAccountDesc: You need to add an account first using `/accounts`.
messages.missingTokenDesc: Could not find a valid u8 token for your account. Please reauthorize with `/reauth`.
messages.alreadyUsed: ❌ This code has already been used.
messages.notValidChannel: ❌ This code is not valid for your channel.
messages.notValidPlatform: ❌ This code is not valid for your platform.
messages.alreadyRedeemed: ❌ You have already redeemed this code.
messages.notEligible: ❌ Your account/role is not eligible for this code.
messages.doNotMeetRequirements: ❌ You do not meet the redemption requirements for this code.
messages.limitReached: ❌ Redemption limit reached for this code.
messages.tooFrequent: ❌ You are redeeming too frequently. Please try again shortly.
messages.confirmationRequired: This code requires an additional confirmation flow and cannot be redeemed directly right now.
messages.unknownError: Failed to redeem this code due to an unknown error.
messages.errorDesc: Failed to redeem code. Please try again later.
